report_name: Ransomware Groups Pivot to 'Pure Extortion' as Victim Payment Rates Collapse

attack_patterns.name: Exfiltration Over C2 Channel
attack_patterns.description: Used in 'pure extortion' attacks where threat actors steal data and threaten to leak it, forgoing encryption. This can be blended with normal network traffic to be stealthier.

attack_patterns.name: Exfiltration Over Web Service
attack_patterns.description: Used in 'pure extortion' attacks for transferring stolen data to actor-controlled web services, which can be harder to distinguish from legitimate traffic.

attack_patterns.name: Archive Collected Data
attack_patterns.description: Threat actors stage and compress sensitive data using archiving utilities like 7z.exe before exfiltration in data theft extortion attacks.

indicators.name: Anomalous Large Data Transfers for Extortion
indicators.pattern:
title: Potential Data Exfiltration Over Non-Standard Protocols
id: 9c5b1f3a-7d8e-4b9f-8c6d-1e2f3a4b5c6d
status: experimental
description: >
  Detects network traffic patterns consistent with data exfiltration over non-standard protocols like DNS or ICMP, a technique used in stealthy data theft attacks.
references:
  - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xxxxxxxxxx
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-05-25
tags:
  - attack.t1048
  - attack.exfiltration
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate use of DNS for non-standard purposes, network diagnostic tools using ICMP.
level: medium
logsource:
  category: network_connection
detection:
  selection_dns:
    DestinationPort: 53
    Protocol:
      - 'tcp'
      - 'udp'
    # This rule would need further logic in a SIEM to detect unusually large payloads or high frequency of requests.
  selection_icmp:
    Protocol: 'icmp'
    # This rule would need further logic to inspect ICMP payload sizes.
  condition: 1 of them
indicators.description: Detects network traffic patterns, such as large outbound transfers over DNS or ICMP, that are indicative of data exfiltration used in pure extortion attacks.

indicators.name: 7-Zip Archiving for Data Staging
indicators.x_netsecio_sigma_rule:
title: 7-Zip Archiving for Data Staging
id: a3b1c2d4-e5f6-4a90-8bcd-ef1234567890
status: experimental
description: >
  Detects the execution of the 7-Zip archiving utility (7z.exe). While 7-Zip is a legitimate tool, its execution may be indicative of data staging activity prior to exfiltration, a key component of data theft extortion attacks.
references:
  - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xxxxxxxxxx
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-05-25
tags:
  - attack.t1560.001
  - attack.collection
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate use of 7-Zip by users or system administrators for file archiving.
level: low
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: '\7z.exe'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the use of the 7z.exe utility, which can be used by attackers to stage and compress data for exfiltration.

relationships.source_name: Anomalous Large Data Transfers for Extortion
Anomalous Large Data Transfers for Extortion
